description:
Control all your media players from one beautiful interface in your GNOME panel.
- Play, pause, and skip tracks without opening any app.
- Works with Spotify, YouTube, VLC, browsers, and more.
- Handles multiple players at once with easy tab switching.
- Double-click album art to toggle a spinning vinyl record effect per app.
- Animated tonearm that reacts to play, pause, and stop.
- Panel shows the current track and artist with smooth scrolling.
- Each app remembers its own vinyl setting independently.
name: Advanced Media Controller
